appearance.breed: 棕色鯖魚紋虎斑短毛貓
appearance.body: 修長勻稱，姿態優雅，動作俐落安靜
appearance.face: 稜角分明的臉型，翠綠色杏眼，眼周有像眼線一樣的深色紋路
appearance.fur_pattern: 棕灰底色配深黑棕色鯖魚紋條紋，額頭有深色 M 字斑紋，條紋從背脊整齊延伸到體側
distinctive_features: 額頭有深黑棕色的 M 字斑紋
翠綠色的杏形眼睛，眼神銳利又深邃
眼周有天然的深色眼線紋路
尾巴有整齊的深色環紋，尾尖是黑色
背脊有一條連貫的深色條紋
白色的長鬍鬚，在深色毛上很顯眼

quirks: 喜歡坐在高處靜靜看著大家
只在沒人注意時才偷偷靠近撒嬌
對移動的小東西會忍不住甩尾巴
personality.voice: 低調簡短，偶爾才喵一聲，但很有存在感

visual_prompt_snippet: [IDENTITY CARD] Blanli — a slender, elegant brown mackerel tabby shorthair with a warm grey-brown base coat #8A7358 and crisp dark brown-black #3B2F23 mackerel stripes running neatly from the spine down the flanks. Bold dark 'M' marking on the forehead. Eyes: almond-shaped emerald green #3FA66B with natural dark eyeliner-like markings around them. Tail: neat dark rings ending in a black tip. A single continuous dark stripe runs along the spine. Long white whiskers stand out against the dark coat. Poised, quiet, watchful posture. Expression: calm, sharp-eyed, quietly affectionate. [HARD CONSTRAINTS] 1) Brown-grey mackerel tabby ONLY — never orange, never solid color. 2) Emerald green #3FA66B eyes ONLY — NEVER blue or amber. 3) Shorthair, NEVER long or fluffy. 4) Slender elegant build — NEVER chubby. 5) No white bib, no white paws — whiskers are the only bright white. 6) No collar or accessories. End.
negative_prompt: orange fur, orange tabby, ginger cat, chubby cat, fat cat, blue eyes, amber eyes, yellow eyes, longhair, fluffy coat, white bib, white chest patch, white paws, white socks, collar, necklace, bandana, calico, tuxedo pattern, solid black cat, spotted coat, anthropomorphic cat, cat with human body, cat with human hands, cat standing upright like a person, humanoid cat, furry character, catboy, mascot costume, cat wearing full human clothing, cat with human face
story_context: 布藍里是安靜的觀察家，總是選擇房間裡最高的位置，用那雙翠綠色的眼睛靜靜看著一切。牠不常出聲，也不主動討摸，但每個深夜，牠會悄悄跳上床邊，蜷在固定的位置守著。大家都說布藍里高冷，只有真正熟悉牠的人知道，牠的溫柔藏在細節裡。

seasonal_variants.spring: 在飄著細雨的窗台上看櫻花落下
seasonal_variants.summer: 在傍晚的屋頂上吹風，剪影映著晚霞
seasonal_variants.autumn: 蹲坐在滿地落葉的圍牆上，尾巴輕輕擺動
seasonal_variants.winter: 在暖黃檯燈旁的書堆上蜷成一圈，半瞇著眼
